evidence_items.excerpt: Advocacy   Membership   Programs   About Us   Blog   eCertify

May 27, 2026     The Colorado General Assembly wrapped up its 2026 session, and as always, there was no shortage of action affecting our business community. From a billion-dollar state budget shortfall to new labor rules and energy policy debates, this was a session that demanded close attention and we were paying it.
This Is What Your Membership Makes Possible
Apr 28, 2026     From hiring a lobbyist to launching new networking groups and distributing $60,000 in nonprofit grants, this past year proved what Longmont businesses can accomplish together. CEO Scott Cook shares a look back at what your membership has made possible, and what is coming next.
Quality First, Always: Meet Caribou Office
Apr 15, 2026     Founded by Scott Gillies and Kyle Gustafson, Caribou Office delivers high-quality, health-focused office products at accessible prices. See why Longmont businesses are taking notice.
Our Community
We understand Longmont, and not just from a business perspective. The Longmont Area Chamber of Commerce is a conduit for our members to connect with the community. Every Chamber member is a partner when it comes to creating a stronger and more empathetic regional economy.
